intent_summary: Build Field Monitor Snap-On Tool Phase 3 Orchestrator Worker Deployment. Implement and deploy field-monitor-orchestrator — the hub Worker. Only Worker that calls other Workers via Service Bindings and only Worker that writes to Neon. Wire Service Bindings: FETCHER, PARSER_REGISTRY, PROXY_ROUTER. Implement seven-gate funnel exactly as specified in Doc2 Sub-Hub 5. Gate sequence: (1) trigger validation, (2) proxy router call, (3) fetch+parse+confidence, (4) delta comparison, (5) confirmation logic, (6) signal classification, (7) signal emission. Implement helpers: validateTrigger, getDomain, writeRateState, readFieldState, setConfirmationPending, writeCheckResult, writeErrorLog, classifyDelta, emitSignal, gateExitResponse. gate_reached recorded on every exit path including errors. Run single-URL end-to-end test: seed url_registry, trigger Orchestrator, verify gate_reached:7, check_log written, field_state written via CTB promotion.
phase_label: Orchestrator Worker Deployment — Hub + Seven-Gate Funnel
go_condition: Orchestrator deployed. End-to-end test returns gate_reached:7. check_log row correct. field_state row written. CTB trigger does not fire on valid run. No error_log entries.

agent_routing.db_agent: Seed url_registry with one test record. Verify before Builder runs end-to-end test.
agent_routing.builder: Implement orchestrator per Doc2 Sub-Hub 5. Wire Service Bindings. Deploy via wrangler.
agent_routing.auditor: Verify check_log, field_state, error_log, CTB trigger, and response body after end-to-end test.

constraints: Do not expand scope beyond Orchestrator Worker deployment
Service Bindings are the ONLY allowed inter-Worker transport — no public HTTP between Workers
Orchestrator is the ONLY Worker that writes to Neon
Seven-gate sequence is fixed — gates do not reorder
gate_reached must be recorded on EVERY exit path without exception
job_id is UUID v4 minted at run start, never reused
